name: Applesauce Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream margarine and sugar together until light and fluffy.
2. Add egg whites to creamed mixture and beat at medium speed for 1/2 minute.
3. Stir together flours, spices, baking powder, baking soda, and salt until well blended.
4. Add applesauce, sweetener, and nuts along with the flour mixture to the creamed mixture.
5. Mix at medium speed only until the flour is moistened. Do not overbeat.
6. Spread evenly in a 9x5x3 inch loaf pan that has been greased with margarine.
7. Bake at 375°F for 45 minutes, or until a cake tester comes out clean from the center and the bread pulls away from the sides of the pan.
8. Cool 10 minutes in the pan, then turn out onto a wire rack to cool to room temperature.
9. Cut into 16 equal slices. Serve 1 slice per serving.
